label: About
title: About The Paper Bloom Cipher Procession
short_blurb: Built from 137 recent saved-content signals, 12 inspected links, and 7 unique source objects.
body: Seed image: Morgan Fisher - Flower Music (1998) (i.ytimg.com). The plate borrowed diffuse milky front light with a faint amber glow gathered at the center of the bloom; edges fall into soft charcoal side shadow and materials like cream washi paper, translucent vellum petals, and dull copper ink. Bound sources include Morgan Fisher - Flower Music (1998) and Tangerine Dream 70s Sequencer Pieces, plus 5 more.

gpt-5.5 inspected the finished plate and mapped 7 visible objects, including large translucent central petal veil, warm flower-center pin glow, and right-side copper sequencer ribbon. Outputs were written to tmp/daily-process-runs/daily-process-2026-04-26T16-19-25-084Z.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
